extension.description: Orion v3.2.9 - Complete media addon with multiple torrent scrapers (Torrentio, MediaFusion, Jackettio, Meteor, Bitmagnet, Orionoid), Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox, Trakt integration with scrobbling, watchlists and liked lists, ResolveURL support, watch history, favorites, Kids Zone, account status with expiry alerts, and auto-play next episode.
extension.news: [3.2.9] FIXED: Debrid link resolution using SALTS-style implementation. Token expiry tracking with proactive refresh. Better HTTP request handling. Improved is_authorized() checks for all debrid services.
